title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: Nine Asia-Pacific markets hit licensing, custody, and VASP registration deadlines across Q3 2026, with Australia's stablecoin payment licensing consultation and South Korea's institutional custody framework creating immediate transaction monitoring procurement cycles. Northeast Asia crypto ETF expansion, Southeast Asia custody standard implementation, and Oceania Travel Rule enforcement represent the region's largest compliance infrastructure buildout since FATF's 2019 guidance, compressing 18 m
